text: Final allocation gap fixed: matrix copyRowMajorTo and vector copyTo now use direct strided loops without capturing closures. DenseTransformJmh at 1024 values measured boxed matrix/vector exports at 29552 B/op versus primitive matrix copy 0.016 B/op and vector copy 0.009 B/op, with no observed collections. Final post-fix gate: 450 JVM core, 447 Scala.js core, 30 JVM laws, 30 Scala.js laws, both full JS links, benchmark compile, and clean JVM/JS API docs.
